---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Updates and Supreme Court Interventions"
date: 2026-07-03T16:04:27.890577+00:00
summary: "Parliament passes transgender rights legislation as the Supreme Court intervenes in Delhi power audits and addresses election commissioner appointment norms"
run_time_ist: "9:34PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:34PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Legislative milestone:</strong> Parliament has passed the Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, following its approval in the Rajya Sabha today.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuwFBVV95cUxOS1Y3RmZzYUVKcWZEU082Q3J2S210X3k5NEVLdmVkbTY2TlBsNFZIR2FoWFBrQTFaMDYwcXE3clIzTDN4VV83US1LUmxwd2FVeVZsNW5YeVZHU0ZMUnJLZjhTVjBnRFE2Y2ZpZTMtOWVqYU1TX3BNTHRvZjhscE1yT1JsRjVFYnFITm9GbVVkNEdkVjFrSTNvYldVUU1zSjlGaVZoZDE3T0x1Vmx5VW5ONnNvc0xxQU5kTlkw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I7</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixAFBVV95cUxQU3ZPV0tBQ0k0Q2ZRTFZWZ1JVTjIyOWY4U2VVcEtUMzNURDBlSUdheU1TamkwWWZSQTczRXR2ZUttTUZkdnBJS2JhdFRQTmlIamtZZEpEQ2ROOVJISm9OSXhEYk84TmUyZUJOTHgzci1PaVFSeTlHMWpzQV9rOWEwWHNualRibzRieVJzSXNRY1ZDdVVsSGhGdEVFRjZXeEhoSnFkS2RnbUNpRFFfaFFiWEQwQUVSbGZiZW91ZFpnTjZOLVF0?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Judicial stay:</strong> The Supreme Court has ordered a status quo and paused the Delhi government-ordered CAG audit of private power distribution companies, noting the matter requires a detailed probe.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Election oversight:</strong> The Supreme Court clarified that its ruling on the appointment of election commissioners was intended as an interim measure pending legislative action by Parliament.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I9</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Opposition concerns:</strong> The I.N.D.I.A bloc has written to the Chief Justice of India alleging poll manipulation and requesting judicial intervention regarding the Election Commission and the Systematic Voters&#x27; Education and Electoral Participation (SVEEP) process.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W8</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary preparations:</strong> Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla has reconstituted four Parliamentary Committees for the 2026–27 term, ahead of the Monsoon Session scheduled to commence on July 20.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizgFBVV95cUxQX2F3Nml3b2dlak91al9RREsyX3NPQnVxc191TE8zUFk0QmVlX1ZQZjBXS0R5ZWkzdkJTdk9CUWxYX3I0Vmp6NVptNTV1UHN6ejBOalpHQzJYSG1QUFU4WnRWdHllNVdkS1BMWm55MWpIYW01VnZqVWl3VHRwaGtNVVlJQkJ2M2t4T2FGUF9vZU9KaVdmekxEdXpsSXM1bk40aG1takxjYm9ackZndW5tanNMaFZvakJtbmN0Y1NyUjBhR29SZkl1UXdWZEFadw?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a></span></li>
</ul>
